			This works on both expanded and compacted glyphs, without

GlyphCoordinates([
strr
z,GlyphCoordinates.__repr__.<locals>.<genexpr>z
joinrv
__repr__
GlyphCoordinates.__repr__c
GlyphCoordinates.appendc
GlyphCoordinates.extendc
GlyphCoordinates.toIntc
z#GlyphCoordinates.relativeToAbsolutec
dyr3
z#GlyphCoordinates.absoluteToRelativec
		>>> GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)]).translate((.5,0))
GlyphCoordinates.translatec
		>>> GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)]).scale((.5,0))
GlyphCoordinates.scalec
		>>> GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)]).transform(((.5,0),(.2,.5)))
pyr3
GlyphCoordinates.transformc
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)])
		>>> g2 = GlyphCoordinates([(1.0,2)])
		>>> g3 = GlyphCoordinates([(1.5,2)])
		>>> g == g2
		True
		>>> g == g3
		False
		>>> g2 == g3
		False
GlyphCoordinates.__eq__c
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)])
		>>> g2 = GlyphCoordinates([(1.0,2)])
		>>> g3 = GlyphCoordinates([(1.5,2)])
		>>> g != g2
		False
		>>> g != g3
		True
		>>> g2 != g3
		True
GlyphCoordinates.__ne__c
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)])
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(1, 2)])
		>>> g2 = +g
		>>> g2
		GlyphCoordinates([(1, 2)])
		>>> g2.translate((1,0))
		>>> g2
		GlyphCoordinates([(2, 2)])
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(1, 2)])
__pos__Z
GlyphCoordinates.__pos__c
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)])
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(1, 2)])
		>>> g2 = -g
		>>> g2
		GlyphCoordinates([(-1, -2)])
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(1, 2)])
__neg__i
GlyphCoordinates.__neg__c
		Note: This is Python 3 only.  Python 2 does not call __round__.
		As such, we cannot test this method either. :(
	__round__y
GlyphCoordinates.__round__c
__iadd__r
__add__
GlyphCoordinates.__add__c
__isub__r
__sub__
GlyphCoordinates.__sub__c
__imul__r
__mul__
GlyphCoordinates.__mul__c
__itruediv__r
__truediv__
GlyphCoordinates.__truediv__c
__rsub__
GlyphCoordinates.__rsub__c
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)])
		>>> g += (.5,0)
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(1.5, 2.0)])
		>>> g2 = GlyphCoordinates([(3,4)])
		>>> g += g2
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(4.5, 6.0)])
GlyphCoordinates.__iadd__c
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)])
		>>> g -= (.5,0)
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(0.5, 2.0)])
		>>> g2 = GlyphCoordinates([(3,4)])
		>>> g -= g2
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(-2.5, -2.0)])
GlyphCoordinates.__isub__c
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)])
		>>> g *= (2,.5)
		>>> g *= 2
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(4.0, 2.0)])
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(1,2)])
		>>> g *= 2
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(2, 4)])
GlyphCoordinates.__imul__c
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(1,3)])
		>>> g /= (.5,1.5)
		>>> g /= 2
		>>> g
		GlyphCoordinates([(1.0, 1.0)])
		rd
GlyphCoordinates.__itruediv__c
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([])
		>>> bool(g)
		False
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(0,0), (0.,0)])
		>>> bool(g)
		True
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(0,0), (1,0)])
		>>> bool(g)
		True
		>>> g = GlyphCoordinates([(0,.5), (0,0)])
		>>> bool(g)
		True
boolr6
__bool__
GlyphCoordinates.__bool__N)+r~
